Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Oh, you're those nice students from before. Hello there![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}You have great timing, I was just hoping to run into you two again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Don't worry, though. At least this time, we have an idea of where to find her.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}I believe that this time, Mii-chan went in search of something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}When cats feel that their life is nearly over, they look for a place to wait for the end. Isn't that what they say?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}It's okay. Mii-chan even came to say goodbye to me before she left.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}So... I don't think I'll need you to find her anymore.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Besides, it's more or less the same for me. My day will eventually come, too...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}And when it does, I hope I can rest in peace, without making trouble for anyone else.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}But, I did want to make sure I thanked you two again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}It was nice to see you. Well, good day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}No one is ever truly alone. Not as long as they continue to live in this world.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}See? I have the company of a fine young lady such as yourself![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Bless you, dear girl. You have a kind heart.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Kiyoshi-san said that people live to be happy...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}Was Mii-chan-san... grateful to have been born...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}Where does it originate? Where does it go...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}What reason does life have to exist?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}Living means connecting with others, but all life eventually ends.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}Parting seems to be a natural and inevitable aspect of life.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}I wonder... Will I, too, someday have to part with you forever?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}I do want to live, but that's not the only thing![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}I... It's not just about becoming more human, it's about you...[n]{f 1 1}
